description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a prominent gable roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The main structure is set back from the street, with a paved driveway leading to a detached garage at the rear. The front of the house includes a covered porch supported by columns, and the property is bordered by a low fence and green lawn. The windows are arranged symmetrically on the front facade, providing a balanced and inviting appearance. The garage and house are separated by a paved courtyard, and the overall design is simple yet functional, typical of suburban neighborhoods. The surrounding area includes additional structures, likely neighboring houses, rendered in a neutral gray.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, covered porch, detached garage, and symmetrical front windows, set within a fenced green yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, symmetrical windows, and the main entrance facing the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long driveway, detached garage, and the depth of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage, paved courtyard, and the back of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Direct front-on view emphasizing the porch, main entrance, and the fence bordering the property.
